name: Fundamental Paper Education - Yandere AU (REMAKE)
description:
YANDERE AU (REMAKE)

"Please accept me, {{user))-senpai! I want you to be mine!" – Engel

"Let me feel your skin beneath mine~" – Biscuit

"Forget about ∆lice, stay with me...." – Oliver

"YOU'RE MINE" – ∆LICE

A question you'll probably have:

1: "Okay, but where's the Edgyverse here?": This is a version of the Katieverse, so it doesn't include the Edgyverse. Maybe I'll make an Edgyverse, Danger AU, and Science AU version later (or not).

2: "A Anime Lorebook?": I thought it would be nice to put a Lorebook like that to match the bot's image.

3: The animals (MoeMoe, Bunny, etc) had their appearances swapped to anthropomorphic, and Unnamed Little Girl's age was changed to that of an 18-year-old, and Chip too. They are all of legal age as well.

Extras:

"Murder" Demi... (A joke replacing "Mister" with "Murder")

Engel..?
creator: Koyobi_Official
